problem_text_cn: 3-28 在航天飞船上，如图3-33所示，有一个长$l=20\,\mathrm{cm}$的圆筒绕着与筒的长度方向垂直的轴$MN$以恒定的角速度$\omega=\frac{10}{3}\pi\,\mathrm{s}^{-1}$旋转。筒的近轴端与轴相距$d=10\,\mathrm{cm}$，筒内装满非常黏稠、密度$\rho=1.2\,\mathrm{g/cm^{3}}$的液体。有一个质量$m'=1.0\,\mathrm{mg}$、密度$\rho'=1.5\,\mathrm{g/cm^{3}}$的颗粒$P$，从圆筒中央位置静止释放，试求$P$在到达筒端过程中克服液体黏性阻力所作功。又问，如果$P$的密度$\rho'=1.0\,\mathrm{g/cm^{3}}$，其他条件不变，则$P$在到达筒端过程中克服液体黏性阻力所作功又是多少？
problem_text_en: 3-28 In a spacecraft, as shown in Figure 3-33, a cylindrical tube of length $l=20\,\mathrm{cm}$ rotates with constant angular velocity $\omega=\frac{10}{3}\pi\,\mathrm{s}^{-1}$ about an axis $MN$ perpendicular to the tube’s length. The near end of the tube is at a distance $d=10\,\mathrm{cm}$ from the axis. The tube is filled with a very viscous liquid of density $\rho=1.2\,\mathrm{g/cm^{3}}$. A particle $P$ of mass $m'=1.0\,\mathrm{mg}$ and density $\rho'=1.5\,\mathrm{g/cm^{3}}$ is released from rest at the centre of the tube. Find the work done against the viscous drag of the liquid while $P$ moves to the end of the tube. Also, if the density of $P$ is $\rho'=1.0\,\mathrm{g/cm^{3}}$ with all other conditions unchanged, what is the work done against the viscous drag?
problem_solution_cn:
解 要求计算的是在飞船系中液体黏性力$f$所作功。$f$是真实力，在所有参考系中度量相同，因此可转移到圆筒系中度量。$f$作功与$P$的位移有关，飞船系中$P$的位移由两部分组成。第一部分是$P$随圆筒绕轴转动的位移，它与$f$垂直，在飞船系中对应零功；第二部分是$P$相对圆筒的径向位移$dr$，它与$f$反平行，在飞船系中对应负功，总量记为$W_{f}$。$dr$既然是$P$相对筒的位移，便可转而在圆筒系中计算$W_f$。

圆筒中$P$在径向上还受到惯性离心力$F_c$和液体给它的浮力$F_f$，液体非常黏稠，意即$P$运动缓慢，速度近似为零，于是有
$$ f=-(F_c+F_f), $$
所求克服$f$作功量$W$便为
$$ W=-W_f=\int(F_c+F_f)\cdot dr. $$
据图2-28的解答，可知$F_f$方向指向转轴，大小等于$P$排开的液体应受的惯性离心力。圆筒系中，建立图3-34所示的径向$r$坐标轴。两种情况下，$P$在$r$处所受$F_c$大小同为
$$ F_c=m'\omega^2r, $$
所受$F_f$与$F_c$反向，大小分别为
$$ F_{f1}=\rho V'\omega^2r=\frac{\rho}{\rho'}m'\omega^2r<F_c, $$
$$ F_{f2}=\rho V''\omega^2r=\frac{\rho}{\rho'}m'\omega^2r>F_c. $$
第一种情况，$P$将缓慢移动到筒的右端，克服$f$作功量
$$ \begin{align*}W_1&=\int_{\frac{3}{2}d}^{\frac{5}{2}d}(F_c-F_{f1})dr=\int_{\frac{3}{2}d}^{\frac{5}{2}d}\left(1-\frac{\rho}{\rho'}\right)m'\omega^2 r\,dr\\&=\frac{5}{2}\left(1-\frac{\rho}{\rho'}\right)m'\omega^2 d^2=5.48\times10^{-7}\,\mathrm{J}.\end{align*} $$
第二种情况，$P$将缓慢移动到筒的左端，克服$f$作功量
$$ \begin{align*}W_2&=\int_{\frac{3}{2}d}^{\frac{1}{2}d}(F_c-F_{f2})dr=-\frac{3}{2}\left(1-\frac{\rho}{\rho'}\right)m'\omega^2 d^2\\&=3.29\times10^{-7}\,\mathrm{J}.\end{align*} $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution We need to compute the work done by the viscous force $f$ in the spacecraft frame. $f$ is a real force, measured the same in all reference frames; therefore we can transfer the measurement to the tube frame. The work done by $f$ is related to the displacement of $P$. In the spacecraft frame, the displacement of $P$ consists of two parts. The first part is the displacement due to the rotation of the tube about the axis; it is perpendicular to $f$ and contributes zero work in the spacecraft frame. The second part is the radial displacement $dr$ of $P$ relative to the tube; it is antiparallel to $f$ and contributes negative work, denoted $W_f$ in total. Since $dr$ is the displacement of $P$ relative to the tube, we can compute $W_f$ in the tube frame.

Inside the tube, $P$ also experiences the inertial centrifugal force $F_c$ and the buoyant force $F_f$ from the liquid. The liquid is very viscous, meaning $P$ moves slowly, with velocity approximately zero, so
$$ f=-(F_c+F_f). $$
The required work $W$ done against $f$ is then
$$ W=-W_f=\int(F_c+F_f)\cdot dr. $$
According to the solution of Figure 2-28, $F_f$ points toward the rotation axis, and its magnitude equals the inertial centrifugal force on the liquid displaced by $P$. In the tube frame, set up a radial coordinate $r$ as shown in Figure 3-34. In both cases, the magnitude of $F_c$ on $P$ at position $r$ is
$$ F_c=m'\omega^2r. $$
The magnitude of $F_f$, opposite to $F_c$, is respectively
$$ F_{f1}=\rho V'\omega^2r=\frac{\rho}{\rho'}m'\omega^2r<F_c, $$
$$ F_{f2}=\rho V''\omega^2r=\frac{\rho}{\rho'}m'\omega^2r>F_c. $$
In the first case, $P$ slowly moves to the right end of the tube; the work done against $f$ is
$$ \begin{align*}W_1&=\int_{\frac{3}{2}d}^{\frac{5}{2}d}(F_c-F_{f1})dr=\int_{\frac{3}{2}d}^{\frac{5}{2}d}\left(1-\frac{\rho}{\rho'}\right)m'\omega^2 r\,dr\\&=\frac{5}{2}\left(1-\frac{\rho}{\rho'}\right)m'\omega^2 d^2=5.48\times10^{-7}\,\mathrm{J}.\end{align*} $$
In the second case, $P$ slowly moves to the left end of the tube; the work done against $f$ is
$$ \begin{align*}W_2&=\int_{\frac{3}{2}d}^{\frac{1}{2}d}(F_c-F_{f2})dr=-\frac{3}{2}\left(1-\frac{\rho}{\rho'}\right)m'\omega^2 d^2\\&=3.29\times10^{-7}\,\mathrm{J}.\end{align*} $$
img_cn: 图3-33展示了航天飞船上的一个长圆筒，圆筒绕与其长度方向垂直的轴MN旋转。图中标出了圆筒长度l、近轴端与轴的距离d、旋转角速度ω等参数。圆筒内装有黏稠液体，颗粒P从圆筒中央释放。示意图展示了圆筒、轴MN、颗粒P的相对位置和旋转方向。
图3-34展示了圆筒系中建立的径向r坐标轴。图中标注了颗粒P的位置r，以及从圆筒中心到左右两端的距离。图示帮助分析颗粒P所受的惯性离心力Fc和浮力Ff的方向与大小，为计算克服黏性阻力做功提供了几何框架。
img_en: Figure 3-33 shows a long cylindrical tube on a spacecraft. The tube rotates about an axis MN perpendicular to its length. The diagram labels the tube length l, the distance d from the near end to the axis, the angular velocity ω, etc. The tube is filled with a viscous liquid, and particle P is released from the center of the tube. The schematic shows the tube, axis MN, particle P, and the rotation direction.

Figure 3-34 shows the radial coordinate r set up in the tube frame. The diagram marks the position r of particle P and the distances from the tube center to its left and right ends. The illustration helps analyze the direction and magnitude of the centrifugal force Fc and buoyant force Ff on particle P, providing the geometric framework for calculating the work done against viscous drag.
